name: Irritating Seedpod (Major)
description:
Activate Cast a Spell (add 1 action)

When you crack open this soft, spongy seedpod, you can use it as a catalyst when casting a spell. When you do, irritating pollen fills the area for the spell's duration. Creatures in the area must attempt a saving throw to avoid sneezing uncontrollably. On a failed save, the creature becomes Slowed 2 for 1 round, then Slowed 1 for 3 rounds. A creature that succeeds at this saving throw becomes temporarily immune to the irritating seedpod's pollen for 10 minutes.
